case_title: BRUCE PEDERSON et al VS. DAWNE BERNHARDT

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEDERSON, BRUCE PEDERSON, MARILYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERNHARDT, DAWNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,550.00 FILED BY PEDERSON, BRUCE PEDERSON, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT BERNHARDT, DAWNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEDERSON, BRUCE PEDERSON, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT BERNHARDT, DAWNE
CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD RETURNED UNSIGNED BY DEFENDANT. NOTE: SC-100 NOT ATTACHED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRUCE PEDERSON. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. (CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD NOT SIGNED) CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.
